title: cleistopholis staudtii
intro: Cleistopholis staudtii, also known as the African starfruit, is a species of plant native to central and western Africa, characterized by its distinctive star-shaped fruits. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic activities. The health benefits of Cleistopholis staudtii include the treatment of fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and ointments made from the plant's leaves, bark, and roots, which are often used in folk medicine to alleviate various ailments.
